subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and we're glad to know about the potential synergy between our teams.

We'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are some available slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works best for you and we'll get a calendar invite sent over.

Regarding your request for internal contact details (CTO, VP of Engineering, etc.) — we're not able to share internal directory information or direct contact lines externally. If there are specific technical topics you'd like to address at the senior level, we're happy to facilitate the right introductions through the proper channels once we've had our initial call.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
